placeholderImages.description: A visceral, dark scene of a Demogorgon-like monster emerging from a glowing red rift in a dark forest.
Haunting silhouette of the Hawkins laboratory under a blood-red moon.
A dark, eerie scene of a boarded-up spooky house with red glowing windows and a massive monster hand reaching from the shadows.
A grand mastery winning card featuring the 'Crypto Things' logo, Level 7 confirmation, and the main Hawkins cast in a cinematic golden-bordered frame.
